findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem IsIsotropic.map_of_invariant|theorem IsLagrangian.map_of_invariant|IsMaximalTotallyReal" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic` shows the two map lemmas are introduced only in `LagrangianTotallyReal.lean:86` and `:131`, while the canonical Lagrangian API lives in `Lagrangian.lean:86-171` and the totally-real API is only used by the later bridge statements at `LagrangianTotallyReal.lean:110-127`.
findings.fix: Move these invariant-image lemmas, and any needed private `finrank_map_toLinearMap` helper, to `TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/Lagrangian.lean` near the existing `IsIsotropic`/`IsLagrangian` lemmas; leave only the tame/maximal-totally-real bridge here.
findings.issue: `IsIsotropic.map_of_invariant` and `IsLagrangian.map_of_invariant` do not use `IsMaximalTotallyReal` or any totally-real API, so placing them in `LagrangianTotallyReal.lean` makes broadly useful Lagrangian transport lemmas depend on an unrelated later bridge file.

summary: The main Lagrangian-to-totally-real bridge is in a reasonable symplectic bridge file, but the invariant-image lemmas are core Lagrangian API and should not be hidden behind the totally-real import.
